overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a wizard character in robes and pointed hat exploring a cozy, underground common room with arched stone ceilings and warm lantern lighting. The character enters through a round door, walks through the main hall with other students, and enters a private study room with bookshelves and stained glass.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow underground corridor with arched stone ceiling

events.description: character reaches and begins opening the large round wooden door with stained glass panels

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a narrow stone corridor toward an ornate round entry door

entered.detail: curved stone ceiling with wooden support beams and warm lighting
large circular wooden door with art nouveau stained glass panels depicting floral patterns
rough-hewn stone walls with decorative carved patterns near the base
medieval-style iron lanterns mounted on the walls providing warm light
simple wooden bench along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, warmly lit underground corridor with arched ceilings and stone walls. The camera follows from behind as the character approaches a large, ornate round door with stained glass panels.

scene_state.functional_zone: large underground common room with high vaulted ceilings and upper balconies

events.description: character opens the round door and enters the large common room, revealing the spacious interior
character turns slightly to the right while walking to explore the central area of the room

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room and observing the architecture and other students relaxing

notable_agents.action: student sitting on a sofa near a chess table, reading a book
student sitting on a chesterfield sofa near the wall

entered.detail: high curved ceiling with exposed wooden beams and hanging plants
ornate wooden railings on the upper level overlooking the main floor
tall standing lamp with a cream-colored fringed shade
burgundy leather chesterfield sofa with button tufting
round wooden table with a chess game set up on top
large chandelier made of antlers hanging from the ceiling
large circular patterned rug covering the stone floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious, high-ceilinged common room with warm lighting from lamps and chandeliers. The room features wooden balconies on upper levels, comfortable sofas, and students sitting and reading. The camera moves through the main area, passing a large floor lamp and chess table.

scene_state.functional_zone: rear section of common room with bookshelves and archway passages

events.description: character walks through an archway into the back section of the common room
character passes behind a large wooden support column, briefly obscuring the view

agents.ego_description: walking toward the back of the common room, passing by bookshelves and bulletin boards

notable_agents.action: student sitting in an armchair reading near the bookshelf

entered.detail: built-in stone bookshelf filled with books, forming an archway shape
wooden board on the wall covered with posted notices and papers
potted cone-shaped topiary trees flanking the passage
smaller circular woven rug with geometric patterns
stone archway leading to another section of the common room

segments.scene_description: The character moves toward the back of the common room, passing through archways and by a stone bookshelf. The area features topiary plants, bulletin boards, and fewer students. The camera continues forward toward a rear passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: small private study bedroom with domed stained glass ceiling

events.description: character enters a small private room through a wooden doorway, leaving the main common room
character stops walking and looks upward at the stained glass ceiling

agents.ego_description: entering a private study room and looking around at the bookshelves and decor, then gazing up at the ceiling

entered.detail: domed ceiling with intricate art nouveau stained glass panels in green and red tones
tall wooden bookshelves packed with books lining the left wall
plush red velvet armchair with wooden frame in the corner
tall stacks of books piled on the floor reaching nearly to the ceiling
framed scientific illustrations of plants and flowers on the wall
large wooden trunk with metal bands sitting on the floor
three-tiered serving stand with pastries or decorative items

segments.scene_description: The character enters a small, cozy private study room with a domed stained glass ceiling, floor-to-ceiling bookshelves, and stacks of books. The room is carpeted and features a comfortable armchair. The character looks up at the intricate stained glass dome at the end of the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow underground passage into a sprawling common room and finally into a secluded private study. It begins by trailing the character through a warmly lit stone corridor with arched ceilings, moving steadily toward a large, ornate round door with stained glass panels. As the character passes through the door, the space expands into a high-ceilinged common room filled with chandeliers, wooden balconies, and students lounging on sofas. The camera then glides through the main hall past a chess table and through stone archways, shifting from the social hub toward a quieter area with topiary plants and bookshelves. Finally, the movement leads into a cozy, carpeted study room where the camera tilts upward to reveal an intricate stained glass dome above stacks of books and a comfortable armchair.
